completed_tasks.name: Phase 405 Backend Core CLOSED (all gates: 4 plans, suite 598/0/2, verify 7/7, review 0C/3W fixed, secure 17/17, nyquist-compliant; migration=TRUE AddRetakeColumnsAndArchive applied local)
Phase 406 discuss (4 decisions D-01..D-04) + ui-phase (UI-SPEC 6/6) + plan (3 plans, checker PASSED)
Phase 406 execute: 406-01 backend (RiwayatUnifier+endpoint+partial, unifier 6/6) + 406-02 card+binding (Playwright 6/6) + 406-03 modal (Playwright 5/5); suite 604/0/2
Phase 406 code-review 0C/1W/3I → fix WR-01 all_fixed (3-branch pending badge)

remaining_tasks.name: Phase 406 VALIDATE gate (Nyquist): /gsd-validate-phase 406 → confirm RTK-05/08 coverage (RiwayatUnifier xUnit + Playwright e2e 11/11) → nyquist_compliant:true. Then mark phase 406 complete (roadmap checkbox + progress table + STATE).

Phase 407 Worker Self-Service (RTK-09/10/11/12/13): CMP/RetakeExam endpoint + Results UI (tombol/counter/cooldown/lock) + gating showWrongFlagsOnly + riwayat pekerja. FRONTEND → discuss+ui-phase+plan+execute+gates+Playwright UAT. depends 405.

After all phases: audit-milestone v32.4 → STOP before complete-milestone (user owns). notify IT migration=TRUE (405 AddRetakeColumnsAndArchive).

human_actions_pending.action: Eventually: deploy bundle (v32.1+v32.3+v32.4) = 1 push origin/ITHandoff + notify IT migration=TRUE (405 AddRetakeColumnsAndArchive + carry 399 UserUnits + 360 PendingProtonBypass + 372 ShuffleToggles)
human_actions_pending.context: All work local NOT pushed; promotion = IT responsibility (CLAUDE.md)

decisions.decision: Sequential-on-main execution (USE_WORKTREES=false) for all phase executes
decisions.rationale: .NET + EF migration chain + Playwright + shared SQLEXPRESS/port-5270 → worktree parallelism not worth merge/contention complexity

decisions.decision: 405 WR-01: HC reset of Open-status session = success no-op (not error)
decisions.rationale: fixes regression vs old ResetAssessment; Open session has nothing to clear; error would be worse UX. Behavior-contract change (surfaced to user, accepted).

decisions.decision: 406 D-01 riwayat = AJAX endpoint RiwayatPercobaan + lazy-fetch modal (not pre-render-all)
decisions.rationale: pre-render-all is N queries/worker on page load, expensive for 30-100 participants; HC opens 1-2
shape-identical to archive → single render path, kill-drift

next_action: /gsd-validate-phase 406 (Nyquist gate — last gate for 406). Then mark 406 complete + resume /milestone-autopilot 32.4 → phase 407 discuss.
context_notes: Driving v32.4 via milestone-autopilot. Pipeline per phase: discuss(interactive)→ui-phase(if frontend)→plan→execute→verify→regression→code-review(+fix)→secure→validate→Playwright UAT(in execute for UI)→commit, then next phase. Phase 406 is 1 gate from done (validate). All commits local on ITHandoff, NOT pushed. App localhost:5270, SQL localhost\SQLEXPRESS/HcPortalDB_Dev, EF commands need ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development (base appsettings=SQLite). Playwright @5270 needs Authentication__UseActiveDirectory=false + admin@pertamina.com + SEED_WORKFLOW (snapshot→seed→restore) + --workers=1. Full suite currently 604/0/2 (2 skip = pre-existing PROTON endtoend).
